notes: Democratic Republic of Congo — often split from COG in datasets
Cuba — World Bank data often missing
North Korea — World Bank data absent
Palestine / West Bank and Gaza — incomplete World Bank data
Sudan — split from South Sudan (SSD) in 2011; pre-2011 data combined
South Sudan — independent 2011; no pre-2011 data
Eswatini — formerly Swaziland; older data use SWZ/SWZ or SZ
Turkey — officially renamed Türkiye in 2022; World Bank may lag
Kosovo — not an ISO-3 member; World Bank uses XKX
